sectorSelect.title: What's your reality?
sectorSelect.subtitle: ExpertSync adapts to your industry. Choose your sector to discover how we can help.

industrial.title: Manufacturing, Distribution & Processing
industrial.description: Maintenance procedures, quality control, production protocols — make operational expertise accessible to your field teams.

financial.title: Financial Services
financial.description: Regulatory compliance, internal policies, audit procedures — give your teams instant access to the right answers.

hero.title: Every unanswered question is costing you money.
hero.subtitle: Downtime, assembly errors, rework, delivery delays. When your technicians can't find the right spec at the right time, your margins pay the price. ExpertSync delivers instant answers from your technical manuals. Zero wasted time.
hero.cta: See how much you're losing. 10-min call.

problem.title: Two situations. The same hidden cost.
problem.subtitle: Whichever applies to you, the result is identical: wasted time, preventable errors, and margin slipping away. ExpertSync solves both.

items.title: Case 1: Your data is centralized. Nobody uses it.
items.description: You invested months (and thousands of dollars) building a clean knowledge base. But on the floor, your people search for 20 minutes, can't find the answer, and end up calling a senior or improvising. Your investment sits idle, the same mistakes keep happening, and the documentation goes stale without anyone noticing.

items.title: Case 2: Nothing has been centralized yet.
items.description: Critical know-how lives in the heads of 2 or 3 key people. When one of them is out, sick, or retires, production slows down or stops. New hires take months to ramp up, and every gap in knowledge transfer costs you in rework, delays, and unhappy customers.

solution.title: An AI that follows your specs. To the letter.
solution.subtitle: ExpertSync reads your machine manuals, spec sheets, assembly procedures, and component specifications. It answers strictly based on what's documented. No hallucinations. No guesses.
features: Grounded exclusively in your internal technical documents
Answers based on your exact specifications, not approximations
Every answer traces back to the source manual, section, and page
Designed for shop floor decisions in equipment manufacturing
solution.question: "What's the torque spec for the M12 flange bolt on the PH-400 hydraulic press?"
solution.answer: "Apply 85 Nm ± 5 Nm. Use calibrated torque wrench. Star pattern tightening sequence. Verify with angle measurement per Section 4.2.3."
solution.answerSource: Source: PH-400 Technical Manual Rev.7, Section 4.2.3, p.47
solution.notDocumented: "This specification is not available in the current documentation. Please consult your engineering team."

howItWorks.title: How ExpertSync works
howItWorks.subtitle: Intentionally scoped to deliver value fast: one production line, one equipment type, one document corpus. Up and running in 7 to 14 days.

steps.title: Select one use case
steps.description: Choose a specific area: equipment assembly, preventive maintenance, calibration, quality control, or commissioning.

steps.title: We ingest your documents
steps.description: We validate, structure, and index your machine manuals, spec sheets, and existing procedures. No rewriting needed.

steps.title: Your team gets answers
steps.description: Your technicians ask questions in plain language and get exact answers instantly, with full source traceability.

howItWorks.note: Step 1 is deliberately limited so you can validate results before expanding. Typical implementation: 7–14 days.

safety.title: Your technical data. Your control. Maximum security.
safety.subtitle: ExpertSync is built for industrial equipment manufacturers where intellectual property and technical confidentiality are non-negotiable.

points.title: No public AI training
points.description: Your drawings, specifications, and procedures are never used to train external models.

points.title: Private data infrastructure
points.description: Your technical documents stay within a dedicated, isolated environment.

points.title: Full document control
points.description: You decide exactly which manuals and spec sheets are indexed. Add or remove at any time.

points.title: Transparent traceability
points.description: Every answer links to the source manual, section, page, and document version.

points.title: Continuous knowledge optimization
points.description: Administrators see unanswered questions. Update procedures or add new manuals instantly.

points.title: Air-gapped deployment options
points.description: To protect your intellectual property, ExpertSync can be deployed on your private cloud or local servers.

pricing.title: Simple, predictable pricing
pricing.subtitle: Designed to start small and expand only once value is proven.
included: AI answers aligned with your specifications

items.question: Is this a replacement for our technical manuals?
items.answer: No. ExpertSync doesn't replace your manuals, it makes them accessible. Your spec sheets and procedures remain the source of truth. ExpertSync helps your technicians find the right specification faster.

items.question: Can it expand to other production lines?
items.answer: Yes. Step 1 is limited to one use case to validate accuracy. Once proven, ExpertSync can cover all your equipment, production lines, and sites.

items.question: Is there a free trial?
items.answer: We don't offer open free trials. ExpertSync starts with a scoped pilot to ensure accurate results with your specific technical documents.

items.question: Who is this designed for?
items.answer: ExpertSync is built for industrial equipment manufacturers: assembly technicians, maintenance engineers, quality teams, and production managers who need fast access to exact specifications.

finalCta.title: Stop losing money on preventable errors.
finalCta.titleFaded: 10 minutes to see how much you can recover.
finalCta.subtitle: We'll look at your operations together. If ExpertSync can reduce your losses, you'll know in 10 minutes. No pitch. No pressure.

hero.badge: Step 1: Start with one use case
hero.title: Your teams waste time searching for the right regulatory answer?
hero.subtitle: ExpertSync gives your financial services teams instant access to exact answers, based solely on your internal policies and regulatory frameworks.

problem.title: Two realities. The same regulatory risk.
problem.subtitle: Whether your policies are centralized or not, your teams make decisions every day. Without access to the right answer, the risk is the same.

items.title: Case 1: Your policies are centralized. Nobody reads them.
items.description: You invested in building a library of policies, guidelines, and procedures. But in the field, advisors and analysts call compliance or rely on memory rather than open an 80-page document. The result: rules applied from memory, outdated versions in use, and regulatory risk quietly building up.

items.title: Case 2: Nothing is centralized. Everything routes through 2 or 3 experts.
items.description: The rules live in the heads of a few overloaded compliance officers. Every question queues up, every absence slows the organization, and new hires take months to become autonomous. Each blind spot turns into a costly non-compliance finding at the next audit.

solution.title: An AI that follows your rules. To the letter.
solution.subtitle: ExpertSync reads your policies, regulatory frameworks, and internal procedures. It answers strictly based on what's documented. No hallucinations. No creative interpretation.
features: Grounded exclusively in your internal documents and policies
Answers based on explicit rules, not probabilities
Every answer traces back to its source: policy, section, page
Designed for compliance and regulatory decisions
solution.question: "What are the KYC requirements for a high-risk client under AML guidelines?"
solution.answer: "Enhanced identity verification required. Obtain source of funds declaration. Compliance officer approval mandatory before account opening. Periodic review every 6 months."
solution.answerSource: Source: KYC Policy v3.2, Section 5.4.1, p.23

items.question: Does this replace our compliance team?
items.answer: No. ExpertSync doesn't replace your compliance team, it makes them more effective.

items.question: Can it expand to other departments?
items.answer: Yes. Step 1 targets one team and one use case to validate value. Then ExpertSync can cover other areas: credit, risk, audit, operations.

items.question: Is it compliant with regulatory requirements?
items.answer: ExpertSync is built with compliance in mind: isolated data, full traceability, built-in audit trail.

items.question: Who is this designed for?
items.answer: ExpertSync is built for compliance, audit, risk management teams, and advisors in financial institutions, brokerage firms, and insurance companies.
